transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Linda Park. I'm calling because my AC unit is blowing cold air instead of heat. Dispatcher: Hi Linda, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Goodman, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 314 Birch Lane. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out this afternoon between 2 and 4. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: AC unit is blowing cold air instead of heat
expected_entities.equipment: Goodman AC unit, an older one, 15 years
